close_reason: Style: String vs Box<str> is negligible
description:
DesktopKeyringBackend has 'service: String' and 'account: String'. They are set once in from_uri and never mutated. Box<str> would shave 8 bytes per field (no capacity word) and signal immutability.

Why it matters: marginal. The struct is wrapped in Arc by the inventory factory, so per-instance cost is tiny.

This is opinion-grade; flag as such. Defer unless touching this struct anyway.
title: Consider Box<str> for service/account fields
